parents.subject: LU-13057 tests: sanity-pcc test_1c: Failed to start copytool

commit.subject: LU-13064 sec: reserve flag for changelogs permissions
commit.message:
LU-13064 sec: reserve flag for changelogs permissions

The connection flag OBD_CONNECT2_CHLG_PERMS will be set
(in ocd_connect_flags2) if an MDT supports checking permissions
when accessing changelogs.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I92e736e1ce411be47781ebdabd8f108f45186737
